name: qipature-skills
description: Personal agent skills for Notion reporting, QQ homework grading, and future self-built workflows.

skills.name: notion-api-weekly
skills.description: Create row-by-row weekly report entries from recent Codex thread activity and upload them to Notion through the official API.

skills.name: qq-homework-grader
skills.description: Grade QQ group homework and prepare score columns for QQEX or Tencent Docs spreadsheets.
